fields.Title: Best Time to Buy and Sell Stock
fields.Pattern: Left fold with product state: minimum price seen so far and best profit so far.
fields.Invariant: After a prefix, bottom is the minimum price in that prefix and best is the best buy-before-sell profit inside the prefix, floored at 0.
fields.Code:
maxProfit = snd . foldl' step (maxBound, 0)
  where
    step (bottom, best) x =
      let bottom' = min bottom x
          best' = max best (x - bottom')
      in (bottom', best')
fields.Pitfall(s): Update the minimum before computing x - bottom'; that still respects buy-before-sell because same-day profit is 0.
